claimText: The Global Observatory on Water Investments (GOCWI) forms a core pillar of the Global Water Partnership's (GWP) Global Transformation Agenda on Water Investments.
evidenceExcerpt: It forms a core pillar of the Global Water Partnership’s (GWP) Global Transformation Agenda on Water Investments.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the parent framework of GOCWI.

claimText: The Global Water Partnership (GWP) is an intergovernmental organisation and multi-stakeholder action network dedicated to water resources management.
evidenceExcerpt: GWP is a multi-stakeholder action network and intergovernmental organisation dedicated to equitable, sustainable, and efficient management of water resources.
examUse: Statement-based question on the organizational nature of GWP.

claimText: The Global Observatory on Water Investments aims to mobilise 15 billion for water security by the year 2030.
evidenceExcerpt: Aims to mobilise 15 billion for water security by 2030.
examUse: Statement-based question testing specific financial targets and timelines.

claimText: GOCWI serves as a high-level platform to sustain political and financial momentum for water investments.
evidenceExcerpt: Serves as a high-level platform to sustain political and financial momentum for water investments.
distractorHooks: Acts as a regulatory authority for transboundary rivers
Functions as a direct lending institution for water infrastructure
